title: Smoky Celeriac German Salad
description: A smoky, crispy, and flavorful solo-dinner dish featuring celeriac cooked with cider in a pressure cooker for a deliciously healthy and comforting meal.
instructions: Peel and thinly slice the celeriac.
In a pressure cooker, combine sliced celeriac with apple cider vinegar, olive oil, thyme sprigs, salt, and pepper. Seal and cook on high for about 5 minutes or until tender.
Transfer the cooked mixture to a bowl. Let it cool slightly before shredding into thin strips.
Mix in additional apple cider vinegar if needed for desired tanginess.
Garnish with fresh thyme leaves before serving.
